title: Coloured Categories
description: One colourway for all tooltips is kinda lame.
body:
# One colourway for all tooltips is kinda lame.
## Especially for modpacks meant for cool features!
_Insert **Coloured Categories**._ A way for modpack makers to apply their pack colourway to their tooltips!
This mod depends on nothing for default functionality! Just a config file :)
_However it does have support for KubeJS and CraftTweaker!_  
Credits: Just link to this project page and send me a message, its motivating to know people are actually using the mod :)

_Every launch, new colours._
By default, it randomly colours all parts of the tooltip for all items.
It computes on the fly, and caches it.


[Feature Showcase](https://xyz.stapleton.pw/mc/CC-FeatureShowcase.mp4)
[Item Showcase](https://xyz.stapleton.pw/mc/CC-ItemShowcase.mp4)

### _Version Support and [Wiki](https://wiki.stapleton.pw/books/coloured-categories)_
Config - 1.12/1.18/1.19  
KubeJS - 1.18/1.19  
CraftTweaker - 1.18/1.19  

1.13-1.17 can be supported if theres enough demand.
